title: LifeSmart SUBLIME Panel Classic (Crest 1/ Obsidian Black) SLCY1C05
description:
It's Rare - The Signature Collection is SUBLIME’s peak craftsmanship. Dozens of advanced techniques, CNC carving, multi-axis engraving, and careful hand-finishing, bring each panel to life with rich texture and depth. These finishes are rare on purpose: made with care, and never repeated too often. Bold and full of character, Signature is made for those who want their space to stand out with confidence, culture, and lasting individuality.
Adapter: This SKU default does not include actuators. Need to be ordered together with extra actuators. | Notes: Cover Dimensions：86*86mm； Panel Mounting Projection: 12.5 mm (13.5 mm for textured and deep-carved Pro/Max panels) Mounting Method: The face cover attaches to the flange via magnetic attachment; the flange is fixed to a recessed 86-type back box. Wired CoTP: CoTP 3-pin interface * 1； Wireless CoSS: Supported by the device
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
